title: Version 2.1 — Finder Engine
flowcharts:
flowchart TD
    stage["2.1.x Finder Engine"]
    contract["Contract"]
    service["Service"]
    surface["Surface"]
    data["Data"]
    ops["Ops"]
    gate["Release gate"]
    stage --> contract --> gate
    stage --> service --> gate
    stage --> surface --> gate
    stage --> data --> gate
    stage --> ops --> gate

flowchart LR
    hook["useEmailFinderSingle or emailService"] --> gql["findEmail GraphQL"]
    gql --> gw["gateway auth plus credit check"]
    gw --> go["emailapigo Go worker"]
    go --> pat["up to 10 pattern formats"]
    pat --> cache["email_finder_cache lookup"]
    cache --> score["rank or score candidates"]
    score --> norm["normalize metadata for UI"]
    norm --> dash["dashboard finder results"]
    dash --> gate["2.1 release gate"]
micro_gate:
**Patch intent bands:** `.0` charter · `.1`–`.3` core path · `.4`–`.6` hardening · `.7`–`.8` integration · `.9` minor freeze / handoff.
Theme: **Pattern** — codenames in per-patch `2.1.P — *.md` files.
